---
title: brew
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = FALSE
)
```

https://brew.sh/

#### Install Homebrew

```sh
/usr/bin/ruby -e "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/master/install)"
```
